title: StreamerMode
description: Client-side streamer utilities: HUD presets, personal time & weather, stream-safe mode, and a bedrock+tuff hider.
body:
# 🎮 StreamerMode

### Clean HUD. Better Visibility. Stream-Friendly.

StreamerMode is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod designed for streamers, content creators, PvP players, and anyone who prefers a cleaner Minecraft experience.

---

## ✨ Features

### 🎥 Stream Mode
Hide distracting interface elements while streaming or recording.

**Supported Elements**
- Chat
- Tab List
- Boss Bars
- Toast Notifications

Perfect for:
- Twitch Streams
- YouTube Videos
- Screenshots
- Cinematic Gameplay

---

### ⚔️ PvP HUD Preset

A cleaner interface focused on visibility and combat.

- Reduced visual clutter
- Better focus during fights
- Improved gameplay visibility

---

### 🟩 Vanilla HUD Preset

Keep Minecraft's original look while benefiting from StreamerMode's customization features.

- Familiar layout
- Minimal changes
- Great for everyday gameplay

---

### 🪨 Bedrock & Tuff Hider

Quickly hide Bedrock and Tuff blocks.

- One-click toggle
- Persistent settings
- Fully client-side

---

### 🕒 Personal Time Control

Choose your preferred local time.

**Available Modes**
- Always Day
- Always Night
- Sunrise
- Sunset
- Server Sync

> Only affects your client and does not change the server time.

---

### 🌦️ Personal Weather Control

Customize weather locally.

**Available Modes**
- Clear
- Rain
- Thunder
- Server Sync

Useful for:
- Recording
- Streaming
- PvP
- Better visibility

---

## 🖥️ Compatibility

| Component | Support |
|------------|----------|
| Minecraft 1.21.10 | ✅ |
| Fabric Loader | ✅ |
| Fabric API | ✅ |
| Vanilla Servers | ✅ |
| Client-Side Only | ✅ |
| Forge / NeoForge | ❌ |

---

## ⌨️ Opening the Menu

### Chat Command

```text
/sm
```

### Keybind

You can assign a custom keybind in Minecraft's Controls menu.

---

## 📦 Installation

### Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.10
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

### Steps

1. Install Fabric Loader
2. Install Fabric API
3. Place the StreamerMode `.jar` into your `mods` folder
4. Launch Minecraft

---

## ⚠️ Project Status

> [!WARNING]
> StreamerMode is currently considered archived.

The original source code has been lost, making future updates, bug fixes, and compatibility patches unlikely.

**Latest Tested Configuration**
- Minecraft 1.21.10
- Feather Launcher

---

## ❓ FAQ

### Does this require server installation?

No. StreamerMode is completely client-side.

### Can I use this on vanilla servers?

Yes.

### Does this provide gameplay advantages?

No. StreamerMode focuses on interface customization, visibility improvements, and quality-of-life features.

---

## 💬 Support

Discord:

```text
@cryptcursed
```

---

## ❤️ Designed For

- Streamers
- Content Creators
- PvP Players
- Players who prefer a clean HUD

---

## ✨ Lightweight • Clean • Stream-Friendly

Made for creators, PvP players, and clean Minecraft gameplay.
